LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarsh.label: 被严酷压迫
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarsh.stages.0.label: 受压迫
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrence.label: 被高压威慑
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrence.description: 狱卒真吓人...我不敢有任何行动...
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrence.stages.0.label: 受威慑
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEquality.label: 被平等对待
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEquality.description: 作为一个囚犯我居然被平等对待了！
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEquality.stages.0.label: 被平等对待
